name: Infiltration
tagline: Bypass locks, traps, and security to get in and out unseen.

baseAbility.name: Skill Leverage (Disable Device / Stealth)
baseAbility.description: Gain skill leverage with Disable Device and Stealth, plus three starting abilities: Fast Sabotage (disable devices that normally take rounds in a single standard action, no penalty for rushing), Light Step (move quietly and quickly while sneaking), and Startle (use Stealth as part of certain combat tricks in place of other stats). DC for sabotage effects is 15 + 150% your Disable Device ranks + your operative ability modifier.

talents.name: Planned Sabotage
talents.description: Trade Fast Sabotage for the ability to rig a more thorough, delayed trap into a device instead of an immediate effect.

talents.name: Shadower
talents.description: Trade Fast Sabotage for greatly improved tailing and shadowing of a target without being noticed.

talents.name: Traceless Presence
talents.description: Stealth no longer requires cover or concealment once you have enough ranks in the associated skill; extends further against disoriented creatures with more investment.

talents.name: Skilled Sneak
talents.description: Gain an additional associated skill for this sphere alongside your primary one, letting you mix Disable Device and Stealth options more freely.

talents.name: Perimeter Sense
talents.description: While using a stealthy approach, the GM secretly rolls Perception for you on entering new areas, covering traps within a radius based on your ranks.

talents.name: Startling Maneuver
talents.description: Use the dirty trick combat maneuver with Stealth ranks in place of BAB and your operative modifier in place of Strength, without breaking Stealth against unaware observers.

talents.name: Quick Bypass
talents.description: Further reduce the time needed to disable devices or bypass locks under pressure.

talents.name: False Trail
talents.description: Leave misleading tracks or signs of passage to throw off pursuers using Stealth or Survival.
